name: Robinhood MCP Server
what_it_does: Robinhood MCP server enabling AI agents to interact with Robinhood brokerage accounts — querying portfolio holdings, fetching stock quotes and market data, checking order status, accessing options positions, and integrating Robinhood's retail brokerage platform into agent-driven investment and portfolio monitoring workflows.
use_cases: Monitoring portfolio positions and P&L from investment tracking agents
Fetching real-time stock prices from market research agents
Checking pending and executed order status from trading management agents
Reviewing options positions and expiry from derivatives management agents
Analyzing dividend income from income tracking agents
Building personalized investment dashboards from portfolio analytics agents
not_for: Automated trading execution without human review (high financial risk)
best_when: A retail investor with a Robinhood account needs AI-assisted portfolio monitoring, position analysis, or market data access.
avoid_when: You need execution trading automation, institutional features, or use a different brokerage — Interactive Brokers, Alpaca, or Schwab MCPs are better for those use cases.

auth.notes: Robinhood username and password required. Uses unofficial Robin-Stocks Python library. MFA/2FA handling required. No official API — uses internal Robinhood API endpoints.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Robinhood account free; no API fees
pricing.notes: Community MCP is free. Uses unofficial Robinhood API via Robin-Stocks. Robinhood account required (US only).

performance.rate_limits: Unofficial API — Robinhood may rate-limit or block excessive requests

known_agent_gotchas: Uses unofficial Robinhood API — can break without notice after Robinhood updates
NEVER automate trade execution without explicit human confirmation — financial loss risk
MFA handling is complex — SMS or authenticator app codes may interrupt automation
Account credentials stored locally — treat as high-value secrets
Robinhood may flag automated access and require manual verification or suspend access
Community MCP using Robin-Stocks — depends on that library's maintenance status
agent_readiness.security_notes: CRITICAL: Store Robinhood credentials in secure vault, not plain env files. Unofficial API — no official security guarantees. Never automate trades without human review. Monitor for account suspension. Financial account — treat credentials with highest security.

security_score_components.security_notes: Financial account credentials — use secure vault. Unofficial API. Never automate trades without human review. Risk of account suspension.
